# Koivu Labs

> A Finnish Software Studio focused on AI-driven utility. Bridging human common sense with AI power.

Koivu Labs is an independent software studio founded in 2026 in Saarijärvi, Finland. The studio builds pragmatic, AI-first digital tools designed to solve real problems with minimal friction.

## Studio

- **Founded:** 2026
- **Location:** Saarijärvi, Finland
- **Philosophy:** Pragmatic Intelligence — Nordic precision meets modern AI capability
- **Contact:** hello@koivulabs.com

## Projects

- **BrainBuffer** — Thought capture at the speed of light. Minimalist tool for instant idea preservation.
- **Human Dashboard** — Central OS for life and projects. Everything manageable in one sophisticated view.
- **Vuoto** — Financial tracking and receipt management. Stop your money from leaking.
- **JobBot** — Intelligent tool for job seeking and career management.
- **Vibe Checker** — Analysis of social energy and vibes for optimized interaction.
- **Vibe Coder** — Tool for utilizing the "vibe coding" method in modern development.
- **MPM** — Multi-Project Manager. Early coding experiments in project organization.

- [Home](https://koivulabs.com) — The Birch Tech-Tree ecosystem overview
- [Founder's Log](https://koivulabs.com/logbook) — Dev blog and studio updates
- [Manifesto](https://koivulabs.com/about) — Studio philosophy and founder's journey
